positive: Minimalist geometric mountain range silhouette against a gradient sky of deep indigo and soft dawn lavender, featuring negative space elements. The main mountain peaks are sharply defined and stylized with clean, hard edges. Use a limited, sophisticated color palette dominated by cool tones and contrasting warm golden highlights catching the 'sun' edge. The composition should be centered and scalable for printing on fabric, emphasizing clean lines and visual depth. Style should be graphic, vector-art inspired, and modern, suitable for apparel prints.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifact, watermark, text, logo, writing, complex details, photorealism, gradients, excessive color, messy, low contrast
